title: Scientific Advisory Panel on Software as a Medical Device (SAP-SaMD) - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Panel on Software as a Medical Device (SAP-SaMD)
- Robert DiRaddo, PhD  (Chair) Head, Simulation and Digital Health Health Technologies Program, National Research Council Montréal,  QC
- Laith Bustani, MD,  CCFP Attending Physician Queensway-Carleton Hospital Ottawa, ON
- Joseph Cafazzo, PhD Lead, eHealth Innovation University Health Network Toronto, ON
- Eric Cohen, MD, FRCPC Deputy Head,  Division of Cardiology Sunnybrook Health  Sciences Centre Toronto, ON
- Kimberley Hanson Director, Federal Affairs Diabetes Canada Ottawa, ON
- Christopher Kamel,  MSc Director, Rapid Response and Medical Devices Canadian Agency for Drugs and Technologies in Health Ottawa, ON
- Ron Parker Group Director,  Interoperability, Standards and Analytics Canada Health  Infoway Toronto, ON
- Bakul Patel Associate Director, Digital Health Food and Drug Administration Washington, D.C., USA
- Catherine Proulx Research Council Officer Health  Technologies Program, National Research Council Montréal,  QC
